title: Italian Buckwheat Pilaf
description: A simple and nutty Italian buckwheat pilaf, perfect as a side dish or light lunch.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the diced aji amarillo pepper and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the buckwheat and cook, stirring constantly, for 2-3 minutes.
Pour in the chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until the liquid has been absorbed.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
